authority: Authoritative next-rung planning registry for the adaptive General Frontier ladder. Binds each parent's identity, live-verified architecture, eligibility gate, and honest source/storage status. F2..F4 and both optional rungs were resolved LIVE this session via HfApi.model_info + tiny config.json (metadata only, NO weight download). Only F0 has real measured capability evidence; every downstream rung is source-absent planning-only until its predecessor's full source is released and it is admitted.

boundaries.one_apple_heavy_lease: held by live G4 controller pid 48797; this registry is planning-only and touched no heavy compute
boundaries.only_active_source: F0 (present); every other rung is prep/absent
boundaries.predecessor_evidence_is_scheduling_prior: F0 measured evidence schedules candidate rates for downstream rungs but is NEVER proof of downstream quality

dag_edges.gate: release F0 full source -> admit F1
release F1 (235B) full source -> admit F2 (397B)
release F2 (397B) full source -> admit F3 (685B)
release F3 (685B) full source -> admit F4 (1T)
optional side-rung off the Qwen line; explicit admission + a free predecessor slot
optional post-frontier; explicit signed admission decision

eligibility_gates.F2_397B: eligible_when the 235B (F1) full source is RELEASED from disk (prompt gate: 397B after 235B source release)
eligibility_gates.F3_685B: eligible_when the predecessor (F2 / 397B) full source is RELEASED (prompt gate: 685B after predecessor release)
eligibility_gates.F4_1T: eligible_when the predecessor (F3 / 685B) full source is RELEASED (prompt gate: 1T after predecessor release)
eligibility_gates.optional_480B_and_1_6T: OPTIONAL side/post-frontier rungs; require an explicit signed admission decision in addition to a released predecessor slot; NOT activated

parents.eligible_when: active now (source present; G4 real-forward campaign running)

expected_properties_from_prompt.role: root oracle; only parent with real measured evidence

honesty_notes: param counts are published nominal (config.json carries no param count)

live_verified_properties.source_precision: MXFP4 experts (FP4 blocks + UE8 scales) + BF16 attn/router/norm/embed

parents.measured_evidence: G4 real-forward parent PPL baseline sealed (code_py 1.92 / reason 3.46 / math 5.14 / gen_science 6.68 / instr 12.26 / paris 27.43); sub-bit NEGATIVE at G0-G3 proxy + Second-Light 0.688 divergence
parents.storage_mode: resident_bounded_stream (65 GiB source present; bounded per-expert windows, ~65 GB read/forward, no offload)

parents.eligible_when: full source resident only AFTER F0 (120B, 65 GiB) is released (required_mode: full_after_120b_release)
honesty_notes: admission = metadata downloaded + admission receipt sealed; full 437.9 GiB source NOT yet resident

parents.eligible_when: 235B (F1) full source RELEASED from disk (prompt gate: 397B after 235B source release)
honesty_notes: resolved LIVE this session; sha is the real current head commit
param counts are nominal from the repo name (397B-A17B); config.json carries no param count
512 experts + top-10 + 60 layers is a MUCH wider/shallower MoE than F0/F1; adapter grammar must be re-derived, not inherited
multimodal wrapper: only TEXT_CORE is in adaptive-condensation scope; vision tower excluded
full-source storage not measured; bind exact bytes at admission (bf16 397B would exceed the ~560 GiB free disk, reinforcing the one-parent law)

live_verified_properties.multimodal: vision path present (image-text-to-text; chat template has <|vision_start|> / <|image_pad|>); TEXT_CORE would be the sub-bit scope, vision tower pass-through/excluded

parents.eligible_when: predecessor (F2 / 397B) full source RELEASED (prompt gate: 685B after predecessor release)
honesty_notes: resolved LIVE this session; sha is the real current head commit
LICENSE CORRECTION: live license is MIT (prior giant registry assumed 'DeepSeek License Agreement'); MIT is the verified value
shipped weights are fp8 block-quant (~1 B/param), so full source is ~671 GiB not the bf16 ~1.37 TiB the earlier contract estimated
total_params not in config; ~671-685B is DeepSeek-V3 family public spec (label estimate; confirm at admission)
MLA + 256 routed experts + top-8 + 1 shared; V3.2 adds DeepSeek sparse attention over V3.1

live_verified_properties.source_precision_live: fp8 block-quant (weight_block_size [128,128]); shipped checkpoint is fp8, not bf16

parents.eligible_when: predecessor (F3 / 685B) full source RELEASED (prompt gate: 1T after predecessor release)
honesty_notes: resolved LIVE this session; sha is the real current head commit
shipped weights are int4 compressed-tensors (~0.5-0.6 B/param) -> full source ~595 GiB (matches the earlier contract estimate)
license live value is 'other' (HF); Kimi-K2 family is modified-MIT; pin exact terms at admission
TEXT_CORE (dense trunk + MLA + MoE + shared expert) is the sub-bit scope; vision tower (vision.*) is a separately-claimed, deferred multimodal scope
total_params 1T + active ~32B are family public specs (config carries no param count)

live_verified_properties.license_live: other (Kimi-K2 family: modified MIT; HF reports 'other')
live_verified_properties.model_type: kimi_k25 (KimiK25ForConditionalGeneration; multimodal wrapper w/ vision tower)
live_verified_properties.multimodal: vision_tower + mm_projector present; K2.6_TEXT_CORE is the sub-bit scope, vision tower is a SEPARATE deferred multimodal claim
live_verified_properties.source_precision_live: int4 compressed-tensors (pack-quantized, group_size 32, 4-bit, symmetric); vision_tower + shared_experts + attn ignored from int4

parents.eligible_when: OPTIONAL side-rung off the Qwen line (coder specialization); requires an explicit signed admission decision AND a free predecessor slot; NOT activated
honesty_notes: resolved LIVE; text-only coder MoE (no vision); admission-gated optional, not part of the mandatory F0..F4 chain

parents.eligible_when: OPTIONAL, post-frontier; requires explicit signed admission decision; NOT activated
honesty_notes: resolved LIVE; LICENSE CORRECTION: live license is MIT (prior contract assumed 'DeepSeek License Agreement')
top-6 experts + 384 routed + MLA head_dim 512 + 1M context + sparse-attention indexer + MTP; the most exotic arch in the ladder
total_params 1.6T is the contract label; not in config

live_verified_properties.extra_arch: DeepSeek sparse-attention indexer (index_head_dim / index_n_heads / index_topk) + MTP (num_nextn_predict_layers); 1M-token context

resolution_method.honesty: immutable_revision fields for F2..F4 and optional rungs are the REAL commit shas returned live this session; config properties are read from each repo's config.json at that sha. Param counts not present in config are labeled nominal-from-repo-name or family-estimate.
resolution_method.network: metadata-only (HfApi.model_info + hf_hub_download of config.json only); no weight shards fetched

source_status_legend.absent: repo resolved live; source absent locally; gated behind >=2 predecessor releases or explicit admission (F3, F4, optional)
source_status_legend.admitted: admission recorded + metadata downloaded; full source NOT yet resident (gated on predecessor release) (F1)
source_status_legend.prep: repo resolved live; next-eligible rung; metadata not yet downloaded; full source absent (F2)
source_status_legend.present: full source resident locally + active foundry (F0)

storage_law.consequence: F1 (437.9 GiB) cannot be resident until F0 (65 GiB) is released; F2/F3/F4 each exceed free disk on their own, so the chain is strictly sequential: F0 -> F1 -> F2 -> F3 -> F4, one full source resident at a time.
storage_law.device: Mac Studio M3 Ultra 96GB (28-core); sole Apple heavy lease held by the live G4 controller (pid 48797)
storage_law.name: one_parent_full_source_resident
storage_law.reserve_policy: full source + Doctor/packing working reserve must both fit; if not, the rung stays prep/absent
storage_law.statement: The device disk holds at most ONE parent's full source at a time (plus the working reserve). A downstream parent's full-source admission is gated on the RELEASE of the predecessor's full source. This is a hard disk-capacity law, not a preference.

title: Adaptive ladder parent registry (Parts VIII-IX): F0..F4 DAG + optional 480B / 1.6T
